name: ImprovWiFiBusware
description: Improv-Serial WiFi provisioning for Busware ESP32 products (TUL, TUL32, CUL32, EUL32). Transport-neutral core (feedByte / WiFiBackend) plus Arduino convenience facade for drop-in replacement of jnthas/Improv-WiFi-Library. Bounded 120 s post-boot provisioning window keeps the serial port free for the application's regular traffic.
keywords: improv, wifi, esp32, busware, provisioning, esp-idf, arduino
